name: Zumiez Inc
summary: Zumiez Inc. is a specialty retailer of apparel, footwear, accessories, and hardgoods targeting young men and women interested in action sports, streetwear, and unique lifestyles. Operating under Zumiez, Blue Tomato, and Fast Times brands, the company runs 719 stores across the U.S., Canada, Europe, and Australia, complemented by ecommerce platforms. Products include skateboards, snowboards, bindings, and private label apparel.
